pages.raw_text:
Senator Fred r. Dubois Of Black
foot. Idaho, a director Of the Lewis
ton Waha Land, Water & Power COM
pany. is at the Hotel Spokane. us
company embraces one of the largest
irrigation projects yet undertaken in
Idaho. 1t obtains its water from
Lake Waha. a great natural reservoir
located 20 miles southeast OF Lewis
ton that will irrigate over 10000
acres lying between Lewiston and
Waha. The project can best be re-
kalized when It is stated it will provide
the largest compact tract of orchard
land adapted to the more delicate
fruits. such as cherries. peaches, april
cots and grapes, that can be found
north Of California.


Senator Dubois and ex-senator
Heitfeld have interested in the COM
pany many Chicago business men, a
party of whom about six weeks ago
visited Lewiston to inspect the under
taking. Mr.. Dubois states that suf-
ticient capital has been raised to carry
on the scheme to a successful ending.
